title: SMP Essentials
description: SMP Essentials is A Minecraft plugin Built To Make Hosting A Minecraft SMP's easier and faster!
body:
![smpemaintitle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76b5c6b5069057f833135e98e5c901909b6d4878.png)


**Need help hosting your SMP or Minecraft Event?** Well We Welcome You To SMP Essentials!

SMP Essentials Is A Very Simple Plugin Made To Make Hosting SMP's or Event's Easier!

SMP Essentials has A Simple GUI To Make It Easier To Edit All Settings Within Game.
![SMPE Main GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/201d3ba97922938a217f615e2b820efe7df451ee_0.webp)

![SMPE Main Opts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca474f84450ebbd2fda86eee003e563b2e88cd43_0.webp)
Alternatively you can use the config (I dont recommend unless your changing things like combat log timer or more)!

## 🔨 Features

---Main Toggles---
- PVP Toggle
- Nether Portal Toggle
- End Portal Toggle
- Hunger Loss Toggle
- Chat Toggle
- Block Breaking Toggle
- Explosion Toggle
- Mob Damage Toggle
- Block Place Toggle
- Phantom Spawning Toggle
- Player Interaction Toggle
- Player Grace Period Toggle
- And More!

---Rule Toggles---
- Combat Tagging Alerts/Tag


---In Combat Toggles---
- Riptide Trident Use In Combat
- Elytra Use In Combat
- Water Bucket Use In Combat
- Shulker Box Use In Combat
- Ender Chest Use In Combat
- Wind Charge Use In Combat
- And More!

More on the way soon!

SMP Essentials Also Has A Basic Built In Combat Tagging System! This Tagging System Allows For Admins To Disable Certain Items/Weapons/Blocks In Combat

![SMPE Combat Opt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bdb638e2e8a1b27b54748406ebbca209f4b12d4_0.webp)

Also When A Player Combat Logs Rather Than Giving Them A Punishement It Sends A Report in plugins/smpessentials/alerts.yml

![Alerts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe69bd8e7baaa52c560a668dc004cd473c8d7bc4.jpeg)

This Choice Was Made Because The Combat Log Could Be False Or Taken Advantage Of By Players In The Community, So I Figured It Would Be Better For Players To Report This To There Admin And The Admin Can Check The Alerts.



## **Commands**

- /smpessentials (opens the SMPE menu)
- /vanish (Hides The Player From All Other 
- /unvanish (Unhides The Player From All Other Players)
- /broadcast (Broadcast A Title To All Players!)
- /smpessentials:reload (Reloads the SMPE config)

## Report Issues/Suggestions


This Plugin Is Still In Early Development And If You Have Any Issues/Suggestions On How To Improve It Join My Discord! - https://discord.gg/DtawanAgAa
